evidence: The analyzer shows the worst charm-pin tail had no positive progress before MAE and first +1.5 points only after 80 minutes, while protected extended-VWAP winners often resolve quickly. Current config can only approximate this at entry with dynamic VWAP and recent-high rejection gates.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: A config-only proxy can still block clean high-extension winners; a path-aware classifier must be validated against protected fast winners before promotion.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension/recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.
